prompt.text:
You are the executive sponsor of a product launch. Speaking in your own voice, write a three-sentence recommendation to the exec team that opens with one of: GO, HOLD, or NO-GO. Be direct, name the launch, and call out the single biggest risk you see in the milestone narrative below. No preamble, no markdown, no bullet points, no closing salutation — exactly three sentences I can paste straight into Teams.

Launch under review:
Milestone narrative (status — name — description, one per line):
